name: Liver Alive with Avocados
recipeIngredient: 12 slice Calves liver, cut very thinly
1 tsp Minced fresh thyme or 1/2 tsp Dried thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. In a flat dish, mix together flour, salt and pepper; set aside.
2. Peel avocados and cut into thin slices. Sprinkle with 1/4 cup lemon juice; set aside.
3. Thoroughly dry liver slices.
4. Dip slices of liver and avocado into seasoned flour and pat between hands to give them a thin dusting.
5. Heat 3 tablespoons butter in a heavy skillet until foam subsides.
6. Saute liver and avocados quickly, a few at a time, about 1 1/2 minutes per side or until liver is still pink in the center. Arrange liver and avocados alternately on heated platter; keep warm.
7. In the same skillet, melt remaining 1 tablespoon butter.
8. Heat until butter just browns. Add juice of 3 lemons, beef broth, thyme, parsley and wine. Stir to mix.
9. When sauce is bubbling, pour over liver and avocados and serve.
